pi_items.source: Direct ezdxf parsing of floorplan.dxf from jscad/sample-files GitHub repo. Entity count = len(modelspace entities).
GitHub repository https://github.com/jscad/sample-files states 'The MIT License (MIT)'

pi_items.verified_value: True - contains room labels (FLOOR PLAN, 2 CAR GARAGE, KITCHEN, ENTRY, UTIL., GREAT ROOM, HALL, W.I.C., DECK, DINING ROOM), dimension annotations (63 DIMENSION entities), wall bracing references, 89 TEXT entities with construction specifications

privileged_info_summary: The floorplan.dxf source file is a genuine architectural drawing for a 2-car garage from the jscad/sample-files GitHub repository (MIT-licensed, not Apache as stated in install_librecad.sh). The file contains exactly 967 entities (624 LINEs, 124 LWPOLYLINEs, 89 TEXTs, 63 DIMENSIONs, etc.) across 24 layers with descriptive construction-related names. At 1.07 MB, it contains authentic architectural content including room labels, dimensional annotations, wall bracing references, and construction specifications. The baseline_entity_count of 967 is correctly calibrated for this real dataset.
